footer.heading:
Empowering Women, 
Building Futures
footer.desc: SakhiHub is a women empowerment platform working for health awareness, education, and self-reliance across India.
footer.proprietorship: SakhiHub is a Sole Proprietorship owned and operated by Anil Raseniya

hero.title: Empowering Women, Transforming Lives
hero.subtitle: Join the movement dedicated to health, hygiene, and financial independence for every woman in India.

impact.womenEmpoweredDesc: Building a strong women network across India
impact.fieldTeamDesc: Working at ground level across districts

whatWeDo.title: Empowering Through Action
whatWeDo.desc: SakhiHub works at ground level to create awareness, build communities, and empower women for a better future.
whatWeDo.healthDesc: Promoting menstrual hygiene and overall women health through awareness campaigns.
whatWeDo.hygieneDesc: Providing scientific knowledge about hygiene, sanitation, and infection prevention.
whatWeDo.groupsDesc: Creating strong local women networks for support, safety, and growth.
whatWeDo.employmentDesc: Generating local job opportunities for women at block and village level.

1.title: Awareness
1.desc: Spreading knowledge about health and hygiene in villages.

2.title: Group
2.desc: Forming local support networks of empowered women.

3.title: Training
3.desc: Providing skills and leadership development sessions.

5.title: Growth
5.desc: Building a self-reliant and confident future together.

team.title: The Hearts Behind SakhiHub
team.desc: Our field team works at the grassroots level, connecting directly with women in villages and communities. They conduct awareness sessions, build groups, and help women become confident, independent, and empowered.

sunita.name: Sunita Devi
sunita.story: After joining SakhiHub, I received the right information about hygiene and health, and today I am spreading awareness in my village.

rekha.name: Rekha Bai
rekha.story: I go door-to-door to educate women, and now I have become financially independent myself.

pooja.name: Pooja Sharma
pooja.story: We formed a women's group in our village, and now we all work together and earn a livelihood.

meena.name: Meena Kumari
meena.story: I want every woman in our district to stand on her own feet, and SakhiHub is helping completely in this mission.

whySakhi.title: Why We Stand Apart
whySakhi.desc: Built on trust, driven by impact, and focused on real change at ground level.

reach.title: Grassroots Reach
reach.desc: We work directly at the ground level, reaching remote villages where real support is needed.

empowerment.title: Empowerment Focused
empowerment.desc: Our model is designed to make every woman confident, skilled, and self-reliant.

impact.title: Proven Impact
impact.desc: Thousands of women have already transformed their lives through SakhiHub.

transparent.title: Transparent System

liveImpact.title: Building Trust, Creating Change
liveImpact.desc: SakhiHub is more than just a platform; it is a promise to every woman in India. We work at the intersection of health, dignity, and economic independence.
liveImpact.featuredStory: "SakhiHub gave me the confidence to lead my village group and earn with dignity."
liveImpact.fastActivationDesc: New hubs activated within 48 hours of verification.

trusted.title: Trusted by 50k+ Women
trusted.desc: Active community support across rural districts.

ctaBanner.title: Join Today & Be the Change
ctaBanner.desc: Join SakhiHub today and empower your community. Every step you take creates a lasting impact on women's lives across India. Join the movement now!

actionGrid.empDesc: Work with us and empower women in your community.
actionGrid.memDesc: Join with a simple ₹100 membership and enjoy exclusive benefits.
actionGrid.payDesc: Make secure payments online easily through UPI, Cards & Wallets.
actionGrid.helpTitle: We Are Here to Help You
actionGrid.helpDesc: Our support team is always ready to assist you.

missionPage.title: Our Mission
missionPage.subtitle: Empowering women through information, health products, and skill development.
missionPage.p1: SakhiHub's mission is to provide women with accurate health information, period hygiene awareness, safe sanitary products, skill support, and employment opportunities. We work village to village through women's groups, awareness campaigns, training programs, and micro-industry initiatives to make women self-reliant.
missionPage.p2: Our objective is to reach every block and tehsil, building a healthy, aware, and empowered India.

visionPage.title: Our Vision
visionPage.subtitle: Creating a healthy, self-reliant, and respected network of women across India.
visionPage.p1: SakhiHub's vision is to connect every woman in India with health, hygiene, self-reliance, and respect. We aim to build a powerful women's network where women from every village can become aware, safe, confident, and economically strong.
visionPage.p2: Our goal is not just to spread awareness, but to connect women with a better life, better opportunities, and a better future.

campaignPage.title: Awareness Campaigns
campaignPage.subtitle: Bringing health and dignity to the heart of every village.
campaignPage.noCampaigns: No active campaigns at the moment.
campaignPage.checkBackSoon: Check back soon for new initiatives.
campaignPage.groundSubtitle: How we drive change every single day across rural districts.
campaignPage.groupAwarenessDesc: Interactive sessions with local women groups to discuss hygiene and health in a safe space.
campaignPage.directOutreachDesc: Door-to-door awareness and education by our dedicated block employees and field heroes.
campaignPage.productAccessDesc: Ensuring Sakhi Care Pads are reachable to every woman at affordable prices in their own village.
campaignPage.beChangeDesc: Whether you are an individual, a NGO, or a government body, let's collaborate to make India hygiene-safe.

healthPage.title: Health & Hygiene
healthPage.subtitle: Dedicated to promoting wellness and menstrual dignity for every woman in India.
healthPage.whyMattersDesc: In many parts of India, health and hygiene remain a challenge due to lack of awareness and accessibility. SakhiHub is on a mission to break the silence and provide tangible solutions.
healthPage.bullet1: Reducing school dropouts due to lack of sanitary products
healthPage.bullet2: Preventing infections and serious health issues
healthPage.bullet3: Empowering women to talk about their health openly
healthPage.bullet4: Building a network of village health volunteers
healthPage.statsDesc: Improvement in local health awareness in SakhiHub villages.
healthPage.coreSubtitle: Practical solutions on the ground for real impact.
healthPage.init1Desc: Providing high-quality, eco-friendly sanitary pads to women in rural and urban areas to ensure menstrual health.
healthPage.init2Desc: Regular workshops and camps led by medical professionals to educate women on wellness, nutrition, and hygiene.
healthPage.init3Desc: Forming local committees to monitor and support the health needs of the community at the grassroots level.
healthPage.ctaDesc: Whether you want to support our health camps or need products in your village, we are here for you.

employmentPage.title: Employment & Training
employmentPage.subtitle: Empowering women to build sustainable careers and achieve financial independence.
employmentPage.pathIndependenceDesc: At SakhiHub, we believe that true empowerment comes from the ability to earn and lead. Our employment programs are designed to provide stable income while building community leaders.
employmentPage.exploreDesc: We offer multiple ways for you to grow with the SakhiHub family.
employmentPage.opp1Desc: Join our core workforce. Visit villages, build communities, and distribute essential health products.
employmentPage.opp2Desc: Learn tailoring, digital literacy, and basic business management at our local training hubs.
employmentPage.opp3Desc: Experienced members can move up to management roles, overseeing operations in entire blocks or districts.
employmentPage.statsDesc: Women who have successfully trained and started earning with SakhiHub.

educationPage.title: Education & Awareness
educationPage.subtitle: Knowledge is the strongest tool for empowerment. We bridge the gap between information and action.
educationPage.breakingDesc: Many women are held back not by lack of talent, but by lack of information. Our education programs are designed to enlighten, inspire, and enable every woman to navigate the modern world with confidence.
educationPage.feat1Desc: Basic training on using smartphones, internet, and essential government apps for daily life.
educationPage.feat2Desc: Workshops on legal rights, financial safety, and social welfare schemes available for women.
educationPage.feat3Desc: Communication, leadership, and confidence-building sessions to prepare women for leadership roles.
educationPage.learningDesc: We establish physical centers in blocks where women can gather to learn from each other and from expert trainers. These hubs are the heart of our awareness campaigns.
educationPage.bullet4: Safe space for sharing and learning
educationPage.enrollDesc: Education is a right, not a privilege. Join our next workshop and take the first step towards a smarter, brighter future.

communityPage.title: Community Network
communityPage.subtitle: Building a powerful sisterhood where every woman supports another.
communityPage.unityDesc: Alone we are strong, but together we are unstoppable. SakhiHub creates local village groups where women can share resources, advice, and emotional support.
communityPage.bullet1Desc: Dedicated groups for every block to ensure no woman is left behind.
communityPage.bullet2Desc: A safe space for sharing personal and professional challenges.
communityPage.bullet3Desc: Financial assistance through community-led small savings.
communityPage.walkAloneDesc: Join the largest network of rural women in India. Be part of a group that understands you, supports you, and grows with you.

hiringPage.title: Join Our Mission
hiringPage.subtitle: Empower yourself while empowering thousands of women across India.
hiringPage.impactDesc: Be part of a movement that is changing the lives of 50,000+ women.
hiringPage.growthDesc: Regular leadership training and digital literacy for all employees.
hiringPage.stabilityDesc: Competitive salaries with travel allowance and performance bonuses.
hiringPage.openingsDesc: Find the role that matches your passion for social change.
hiringPage.locationDesc: Selected candidates will be assigned to their own or nearby blocks in their resident district.
hiringPage.statesDesc: UP, Bihar, MP, Rajasthan, Maharashtra & More
hiringPage.beyondDesc: At SakhiHub, we care for our people just as much as we care for the community. Every role comes with built-in support systems.

deliveryPage.title: Delivery Partner
deliveryPage.subtitle: Tehsil / Block Level Delivery Partner
deliveryPage.bizOppDesc: In the SakhiHub Delivery Partner model, the partner does not need to handle hiring, marketing, or group formation. The company provides ready orders, customers, product material, and full operational support. The partner is responsible for local product delivery within their assigned Tehsil/Block.
deliveryPage.jd1: Receiving ready orders from the company
deliveryPage.jd3: Collecting payments for COD (Cash on Delivery) orders
deliveryPage.jd4: Submitting daily delivery and collection reports

partnerPage.title: Partner With Us
partnerPage.subtitle: Collaboration for Social Impact
partnerPage.whoSubtitle: We collaborate with organizations that share our vision of an empowered India.
partnerPage.area1Desc: Organizing menstrual hygiene sessions in rural areas.
partnerPage.area2Desc: Collaborative workshops for vocational skill building.
partnerPage.area3Desc: Expanding the network to reach the last mile.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: At SakhiHub, accessible from www.sakhihub.com, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by SakhiHub and how we use it.
privacyPolicy.sec1Desc: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register on the platform, participate in campaigns, or contact us. This may include:
privacyPolicy.sec1L1: Identity Data: Full name, Aadhaar number, PAN number, and profile images.
privacyPolicy.sec1L2: Contact Data: Mobile number, email address, and residential/office address.
privacyPolicy.sec1L3: Hierarchy Data: Vendor codes, employee IDs, and recruitment mapping.
privacyPolicy.sec1L4: Financial Data: Details related to security deposits and campaign payments.
privacyPolicy.sec2Desc: The information we collect is used in the following ways:
privacyPolicy.sec2L1: To provide, operate, and maintain our platform and hierarchy system.
privacyPolicy.sec2L2: To improve, personalize, and expand our platform services.
privacyPolicy.sec2L3: To understand and analyze how you use our platform.
privacyPolicy.sec2L4: To develop new products, services, features, and functionality.
privacyPolicy.sec2L5: To communicate with you, either directly or through one of our partners, for customer service, updates, and marketing purposes.
privacyPolicy.sec2L6: To process your transactions and manage security deposits.
privacyPolicy.sec3Desc: Like any other website, SakhiHub uses 'cookies'. These cookies are used to store information including visitors' preferences, and the pages on the website that the visitor accessed or visited. The information is used to optimize the users' experience by customizing our web page content based on visitors' browser type and/or other information.
privacyPolicy.sec4Desc: We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information. Your personal information is contained behind secured networks and is only accessible by a limited number of persons who have special access rights to such systems, and are required to keep the information confidential. In addition, all sensitive/credit information you supply is encrypted via Secure Socket Layer (SSL) technology.
privacyPolicy.sec5Desc: SakhiHub's Privacy Policy does not apply to other advertisers or websites. Thus, we are advising you to consult the respective Privacy Policies of these third-party ad servers for more detailed information. It may include their practices and instructions about how to opt-out of certain options.
privacyPolicy.sec6Desc: Another part of our priority is adding protection for children while using the internet. We encourage parents and guardians to observe, participate in, and/or monitor and guide their online activity. SakhiHub does not knowingly collect any Personal Identifiable Information from children under the age of 13.
privacyPolicy.concernsDesc: We take your data seriously. Reach out to info@sakhihub.com

refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.intro: This Refund Policy outlines the terms and conditions for refunds related to security deposits and membership fees on the SakhiHub platform. Our goal is to maintain transparency and fairness in all financial transactions.
refundPolicy.sec1Desc: Vendors paying security deposits for specific campaigns are eligible for refunds under the following conditions:
refundPolicy.sec1L1: Campaign Completion: Deposits are typically refundable after the successful completion and audit of the assigned campaign goals.
refundPolicy.sec1L2: Cancellation: If a campaign is cancelled by SakhiHub before commencement, the full security deposit will be refunded.
refundPolicy.sec1L3: Partial Refund: In case of early termination by the Vendor, the refund amount will be calculated based on the progress made and the specific campaign agreement.
refundPolicy.sec2Desc: Membership fees paid by women members for premium services or kit distribution are subject to:
refundPolicy.sec2L1: 3-Day cooling period: Members can request a full refund within 3 days of payment if no services have been utilized or kits received.
refundPolicy.sec2L2: Non-refundable: Fees are non-refundable once the member has participated in a campaign or received physical benefits/kits.
refundPolicy.sec3Desc: Once a refund request is approved, the amount will be processed back to the original payment method. The typical timeline for the amount to reflect in your account is 5-7 business days, depending on your bank's processing time.
refundPolicy.sec4Desc: Users can cancel their participation in a campaign at any time. However, cancellations made after certain milestones or resource allocations may attract a cancellation fee, which will be deducted from the security deposit.
refundPolicy.sec5Desc: To initiate a refund request, please follow these steps:
refundPolicy.sec5L3: Select the transaction and click on 'Raise Refund Request'.
refundPolicy.sec5L4: Alternatively, email us at info@sakhihub.com with your Transaction ID and reason for refund.
refundPolicy.sec6Desc: Refunds will not be processed in cases of fraudulent activity, breach of the platform's Terms and Conditions, or failure to meet the minimum quality standards for campaign implementation.
refundPolicy.issuesDesc: Our finance team is here to help you. Reach out to info@sakhihub.com

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.intro: Welcome to SakhiHub. These terms and conditions outline the rules and regulations for the use of SakhiHub's Website and Platform. By accessing this website we assume you accept these terms and conditions. Do not continue to use SakhiHub if you do not agree to take all of the terms and conditions stated on this page.
termsAndConditions.sec1Desc: SakhiHub provides a platform for women empowerment through health awareness, education, and economic opportunities. Users include Admin, Vendors, Sub-Vendors, Employees, and Members. Access to specific features depends on the user's role and approval status.
termsAndConditions.sec1L1: Users must provide accurate and complete information during registration.
termsAndConditions.sec1L2: Account security is the responsibility of the user.
termsAndConditions.sec1L3: SakhiHub reserves the right to terminate accounts for any violation of policies.
termsAndConditions.vendorSubDesc: Responsible for managing their respective recruitment hierarchies and ensuring the integrity of the campaigns they participate in.
termsAndConditions.fieldStaffDesc: Responsible for ground-level implementation, member verification, and maintaining regular activity logs in the dashboard.
termsAndConditions.sec3Desc: Participation in campaigns (Health Awareness, Distribution, etc.) is subject to approval. Vendors may be required to pay a security deposit for certain high-value campaigns. All activities must be documented within the SakhiHub dashboard for transparency.
termsAndConditions.sec4Desc: All financial transactions on the platform are processed through secure payment gateways. Security deposits paid by Vendors are subject to the specific campaign agreement terms and the Refund Policy of SakhiHub.
termsAndConditions.sec5L1: Providing false identity or falsifying campaign data.
termsAndConditions.sec5L3: Using the platform for any illegal activities or harassment.
termsAndConditions.sec5L4: Attempting to bypass the hierarchical approval system.
termsAndConditions.sec6Desc: SakhiHub is not liable for any indirect or consequential losses resulting from platform use. Users agree to indemnify SakhiHub against any claims arising from their misuse of the platform or breach of these terms.
termsAndConditions.questionsDesc: Contact our legal team at info@sakhihub.com
